description: ol-unknown-command (issue #117): deterministic tie-break when multiple candidates share the lowest Levenshtein distance. `xat` is distance 1 from the declared procedures `cat`, `hat`, and `bat`, and from the reserved word `at` too; the rule's tie-break (lowest distance, then lexicographic order) picks `at` over `bat`/`cat`/`hat`, proving suggestion choice is deterministic rather than iteration-order-dependent.
